core_principles: Jet Black Void: The background is always #000000. No dark greys as main backgrounds.
Pure White Typography: Text is #FFFFFF. Contrast is the main decoration.
Industrial Rawness: Use visible grids, monospaced data labels, and technical aesthetics.
Cinematic Motion: Elements do not just appear; they slide, fade, and reveal like a movie title.

typography.instructions: Import 'Syne', 'Space Grotesk', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter.

usage_rules.borders: 1px solid #222222. Sharp edges, no rounded corners (except pill buttons).
usage_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use solid flat colors or noise textures only.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200 transition-colors uppercase font-bold tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-4 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors uppercase font-bold tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-4 rounded-none

cards.product_card: group relative bg-transparent border border-white/10 overflow-hidden hover:border-white/30 transition-colors
cards.interaction: On hover, the product image MUST cycle through 3 distinct angles (Front, Side, Back) using opacity cross-fades.

navigation.style: Fixed minimal header. Logo left, Cart right. Menu hidden in a 'Slide-out Drawer'.
navigation.drawer: Full height, jet black, covering 50% of screen on desktop. Large typography links.

marquee.style: Infinite horizontal scroll. Huge outlined text. 'NEVO DROP 001 AVAILABLE NOW'.

motion.scroll_reveal: Elements fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> y: 0) as they enter viewport.

implementation_notes.tailwind_v4: Use @theme directive in index.css for variables. Example: --color-background: #000000;
implementation_notes.react_helmet: Add <Helmet> in App.js or Layout to set title 'NEVO | Industrial Luxury'.
implementation_notes.skeleton: Create a <Skeleton> component with 'bg-neutral-900 animate-pulse' style.
implementation_notes.guest_checkout: Bypass auth. Collect email in shipping form directly.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use gradients. Solid colors only.
Do NOT use rounded corners greater than 4px, unless it is a Pill button.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Syne' for Headings and 'Space Grotesk' for body.
The background must be #000000 (Jet Black), not dark grey.
Ensure the 'ProductCard' cycles images on hover every 800ms.
